originalTitle: SpaceX rises 4% to leapfrog Amazon in market cap, closes short of Microsoft
summary: CEO Elon Musk said Sunday that the company "might be able to reach approximately" $1 trillion revenue in 2030.
content:
SpaceX shares popped about 4% on Tuesday, as Elon Musk 's rocket builder continued its meteoric rise following a record-breaking IPO on Friday.

With the skyrocketing share price, SpaceX briefly overtook Microsoft in market cap, becoming the fourth-largest company by valuation in the U.S.

SpaceX's market cap touched $2.94 trillion in mid-morning trading, surpassing Microsoft's valuation of $2.93 trillion, before finishing the day lower at $2.65 trillion.

SpaceX also leapfrogged Amazon , which has a market cap of about $2.64 trillion. The stock has a higher bar to clear to pass Apple , the third-largest U.S. company, with a market value of nearly $4.4 trillion.

The move comes after SpaceX shares jumped 20% in their first full day of trading after a blockbuster debut. The historic IPO minted Musk as the world's first trillionaire.

SpaceX's stock has surged roughly 62% from its initial public offering price of $135 a share. That's more than Amazon gained in the past five years. The e-commerce giant's shares are up about 45% over that stretch.

Earlier on Tuesday, SpaceX announced it would acquire popular artificial intelligence coding startup Cursor for $60 billion. The deal, which is expected to close in the third quarter of this year, could help give SpaceX an edge against leading AI labs OpenAI and Anthropic, which also offer coding tools.

Musk, who serves as CEO of SpaceX, posted on X on Sunday that the company "might be able to reach approximately" $1 trillion revenue in 2030.

That would be a huge jump from the $18.7 billion in revenue it had in 2025. The company posted a $4.9 billion net loss in 2025, and it lost $4.28 billion in the first quarter of this year.

Founded in 2002, SpaceX has become dominant in satellites through its Starlink service and reusable rockets.

In February, Musk merged the company with his AI startup xAI, after combining the latter with his social media platform X in 2025.

SpaceX's debut has raised questions over its sky-high valuation, despite the huge gains it's seen since listing.

CFRA on Friday initiated coverage of the stock with a sell rating and a 12-month price target of $115, which is a nearly 29% drop from Friday's closing price. CFRA said its view was "due to the company's extremely ambitious growth strategy, elevated valuation expectations, and significant capital intensity."

Speaking to CNBC's " Squawk Box Asia " on Monday, Steve Westly, founder and managing partner of The Westly Group and a former board member of Musk's Tesla , said that SpaceX will need to deliver results to bullish backers fast.

"Investors at SpaceX, I believe, will get pretty grumpy after three or four quarters if he doesn't meet some of the growth projections that they made in the S1," he said, referring to the SEC filing used by companies planning on going public.

Bullish market analysts point to a long-term time frame for returns on the stock.

"When you take a further step back, it's about this fourth industrial revolution, and investors are focused on where everything's heading, whether it's on ships, space, whether it comes to infrastructure, industrials," Dan Ives, global head of tech research at Wedbush Securities, told CNBC's "Europe Early Edition " on Tuesday.

Clarification: This story has been updated to clarify that SpaceX briefly became the fourth-largest company by valuation in the U.S.
chineseTitle: SpaceX 股价上涨 4%，市值超越亚马逊，收盘不及微软
chineseSummary: 首席执行官埃隆·马斯克周日表示，该公司到 2030 年“可能能够达到约”1 万亿美元的收入。
chineseContent:
埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 的火箭制造商在周五破纪录的 IPO 后继续迅速上涨，周二 SpaceX 股价上涨约 4%。

随着股价的飙升，SpaceX 的市值一度超过微软，成为美国估值第四大公司。

早间交易中，SpaceX 的市值触及 2.94 万亿美元，超过了微软 2.93 万亿美元的估值，但当天收盘下跌至 2.65 万亿美元。

SpaceX 还超越了亚马逊，后者的市值约为 2.64 万亿美元。该股要想超越市值近 4.4 万亿美元的美国第三大公司苹果公司，还有更高的门槛。

在此之前，SpaceX 股价在首次亮相后的第一个全日交易中上涨了 20%。这次历史性的首次公开募股使马斯克成为世界上第一位万亿富翁。

SpaceX 的股价较其每股 135 美元的首次公开募股价格飙升了约 62%。这比亚马逊在过去五年中获得的收益还要多。在此期间，这家电子商务巨头的股价上涨了约 45%。

周二早些时候，SpaceX 宣布将以 600 亿美元收购热门人工智能编码初创公司 Cursor。这笔交易预计将于今年第三季度完成，可能有助于 SpaceX 在与领先的人工智能实验室 OpenAI 和 Anthropic 的竞争中占据优势，这两家实验室也提供编码工具。

担任 SpaceX 首席执行官的马斯克周日在 X 上发帖称，该公司到 2030 年“可能能够达到大约”1 万亿美元的收入。

这将比 2025 年 187 亿美元的收入大幅增长。该公司 2025 年净亏损 49 亿美元，今年第一季度亏损 42.8 亿美元。

SpaceX 成立于 2002 年，通过其星链服务和可重复使用火箭，在卫星领域占据主导地位。

今年 2 月，马斯克将该公司与他的人工智能初创公司 xAI 合并，后者于 2025 年与他的社交媒体平台 X 合并。

尽管自上市以来 SpaceX 取得了巨大的收益，但它的首次亮相引发了对其天价估值的质疑。

CFRA 周五对该股给予卖出评级，12 个月目标价为 115 美元，较周五收盘价下跌近 29%。 CFRA 表示，其观点是“由于该公司极其雄心勃勃的增长战略、较高的估值预期以及显着的资本密集度”。

Westly Group 创始人兼管理合伙人、马斯克旗下特斯拉前董事会成员史蒂夫·韦斯特利 (Steve Westly) 周一在 CNBC 的“Squawk Box Asia”节目中表示，SpaceX 需要快速向看涨的支持者交付成果。

他说：“我相信，如果他没有达到他们在 S1 中做出的一些增长预测，SpaceX 的投资者在三四个季度后会变得非常暴躁。”他指的是计划上市的公司使用的 SEC 文件。

看涨的市场分析师指出该股的回报具有长期的时间框架。

韦德布什证券 (Wedbush Securities) 全球技术研究主管丹·艾夫斯 (Dan Ives) 周二在接受 CNBC 的《欧洲早期版》采访时表示：“退一步来说，这与第四次工业革命有关，投资者关注的是一切的发展方向，无论是船舶、太空，还是基础设施、工业。”

澄清：本报道已更新，以澄清 SpaceX 曾短暂成为美国估值第四大公司。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
